name: ebay_advanced
title: eBay Advanced Search Automation
description: Complete a real multi-input search form with keywords, price range, checkboxes, and submit.
prompt: Go to eBay advanced search, fill multiple fields, set filters, and run the search.

steps.caption: Step 1: Open eBay Advanced Search
steps.narration: Here is the opening move. Let's start by opening eBay Advanced Search. This gives the whole demo a place to stand.

steps.caption: Step 2: Enter main search keywords
steps.narration: With the setup in place, we can chase the signal. We enter main search keywords. This is the sort of repetition the workflow should steal from us.

steps.caption: Step 3: Change the keyword match dropdown to exact order
steps.description: Change the keyword match dropdown to exact order
steps.narration: Now the page has something to say. We change the keyword match dropdown to exact order.

steps.caption: Step 4: Enter words to exclude from results
steps.description: Enter words to exclude from results
steps.narration: This is where the pattern starts to show. We enter words to exclude from results.

steps.caption: Step 5: Include title and description in the search scope
steps.description: Include title and description in the search scope
steps.narration: Here the workflow stops posing and starts proving. We include title and description in the search scope.

steps.caption: Step 6: Set minimum and maximum price filters
steps.description: Set minimum and maximum price filters
steps.narration: Now the payoff is close enough to see. We set minimum and maximum price filters.

steps.caption: Step 7: Filter for new-condition items
steps.narration: This is where the result starts to feel earned. We filter for new-condition items. It keeps the flow easy to follow without sounding like a checklist.

steps.caption: Step 8: Run the search and open the filtered results page
steps.description: Run the search and open the filtered results page
steps.narration: That lands the result. We run the search and open the filtered results page. This is where all the quiet setup finally earns applause.
